Why Wilcon

Same trade. Different standard.

Most quotes look identical on paper. The difference shows up six months after the truck leaves — in what doesn't crack, sink, or discolour. Here's where we actually differ from the average concreter.

01 — On site

Kye runs every pour

No rotating crews or hired-in labour gangs. The owner is on your job from formwork to finish, which is why the finish looks the same on job 3 as it does on job 115.

02 — Equipment

We own our machines

Tippers and excavation gear are ours, not hired by the hour. That means no rushing a pour to beat a machine return deadline, and no surprise "equipment surcharge" on your invoice.

03 — Proof

You can see the work first

115+ documented jobs, dated and posted publicly — not a handful of curated photos. Ask to see a driveway from any suburb you're in and we'll show you the real one.

Services

All aspects of concreting, under one crew

From a backyard slab to a full commercial hardstand — one point of contact, one crew, start to finish.

Driveways

Plain, broom, coloured and exposed aggregate finishes built to handle daily traffic and Melbourne's freeze-thaw swings.

Exposed aggregate

The stone-fleck finish seen throughout our gallery — non-slip, low-maintenance, and the most requested driveway finish we pour.

Excavation

Site cuts, footings and drainage prep done in-house before we pour, so nothing gets lost in translation between trades.

Slabs & foundations

Shed slabs, garage slabs and house foundations, reinforced and levelled to engineer spec.

Commercial & industrial

Warehouse hardstands, loading areas and large-format pours, laser-screeded for a true, durable finish.

Tipper & machine hire

Need machinery or cartage on your own project? Our tippers and excavation gear are available to hire.
